name: Push-up
howItShouldFeel: Gentle squeeze across your chest while your core stays braced.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is letting hips sag and shoulders shrug toward your ears.
reassurance: It is okay to drop to your knees or slow down whenever you need.

name: Squat
howItShouldFeel: Even pressure through both feet with warmth in the front of your thighs.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is letting knees collapse inward or heels pop up.
reassurance: Use a range that feels steady today and pause whenever you need.

name: Bench Press
howItShouldFeel: Calm squeeze through your chest as you press the weight away.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is flaring elbows too wide and bouncing the bar.
reassurance: Start light - the groove improves each rep.

name: Deadlift
howItShouldFeel: Stretchy tension along your hamstrings and lats as you stand tall.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is rounding the back instead of hinging at the hips.
reassurance: It is okay to keep the bar high on your shins and move slowly.

name: Pull-up
howItShouldFeel: Smooth pull between your shoulder blades with ribs lifted.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is swinging the legs or shrugging the shoulders toward the ears.
reassurance: Use a band or step whenever you want support - that still counts.

name: Kettlebell Swing
howItShouldFeel: Powerful snap from your hips and glutes with relaxed arms.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is squatting the movement or lifting with the arms.
reassurance: Keep the bell low and short until the hinge feels natural.

name: Banded Row
howItShouldFeel: Light squeeze between your shoulder blades as elbows glide back.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is shrugging the shoulders or letting the band snap forward.
reassurance: Slow pulls are great. Take tiny steps back until tension feels right.

name: Running
howItShouldFeel: Smooth rhythm through your legs with easy, steady breathing.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is tensing the shoulders or holding the breath.
reassurance: Dial the pace down anytime - walking breaks still count.

name: Cycling
howItShouldFeel: Gentle burn through your quads as you spin in a controlled cadence.
commonMistakes: Common mistake is mashing the pedals with locked-out knees or rounded back.
reassurance: Keep the resistance light and sit tall - comfort matters more than speed.
